examples: We cannot afford to be complacent about our health.
We must not become complacent the moment we have some success.
Don't be complacent over occasional success.; Don't feel self-satisfied over a minor success.
But don't be too complacent, warns CPA Ed A. Slott of Rockville Centre, N.
Many on the right will hate that message and see it as complacent and insufficiently militant.
